explanation.summary: Vitamins are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 8 from a base nutrition score of 8. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: small amounts can change a whole meal

topPros.title: can help meals feel more complete and usable
topPros.explanation: Fats sometimes improve the whole plate, not just their own stats.

closing.summary: Ghee does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
